# SplashLens App

> Free, offline-first PWA field reference tool for pool service technicians. 500+ error codes, chemical dosing calculators, AI equipment scanner (error codes, parts ID, test strips), SLAM multi-day tracker, filter guides, checklists, and route tracking. No account, no install, no signal required.

## App URL

https://app.splashlens.com

## What This App Does

SplashLens is a Progressive Web App that pool service technicians use poolside to:
- Look up equipment error codes (Hayward, Pentair, Jandy, Maytronics/Dolphin, Polaris, Aiper, Raypak, IntelliFlo, AquaCal, Sta-Rite, Waterway, Beatbot, Betta — 13 brands, 500+ codes)
- Calculate chemical doses (FC, pH, alkalinity, calcium, CYA, salt, SLAM)
- Identify pool parts by camera using AI (PartSnap)
- Read test strips via AI camera scan
- Track multi-day SLAM treatments through OCLT completion
- Reference filter procedures (sand, DE, cartridge)
- Run opening, closing, weekly, and monthly service checklists
- Track route progress for the day

Everything works offline after the first load.

## How the AI Scanner Works

Three camera modes:
1. Error Scan — aim at any equipment error display, AI reads the code and returns full diagnosis
2. PartSnap — aim at any pool part, AI identifies manufacturer, model, OEM part number, replacement notes
3. Test Strip — aim at a wet test strip, AI estimates FC/pH/TA/CH/CYA readings with range flags

Backend: Cloudflare Pages Function → Anthropic Claude Haiku (vision). Falls back to browser TextDetector API offline.

## Marketing Site

Full feature overview, competitor comparison, blog (300+ articles): https://splashlens.com
